<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. Please fill in the sections below.
For tiny PRs (typo, doc fix), keep it brief — just describe the change.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. Use [x] not [X]. -->

* [ ] `feat` — new user-facing capability
* [ ] `fix` — bug fix
* [ ] `docs` — documentation only
* [ ] `refactor` — internal restructure, no behaviour change
* [ ] `perf` — performance
* [ ] `test` — test-only change
* [ ] `chore` — build, deps, tooling

## Linked issues

<!-- "Closes #123" or "Refs #45" -->

## Checklist

* [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
* [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally.
* [ ] `pytest -q` passes.
* [ ] `mypy src/matchbox/` is clean.
* [ ] If I changed behaviour, I updated the relevant `docs/*.md` in this PR.
* [ ] If I added an architectural decision, I added an ADR to `docs/decisions/`.
* [ ] I did not add any new dependency without explicit justification (see CONTRIBUTING.md "What we won't merge").
* [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org).
* [ ] No PII or API keys in the diff.

## Test plan

<!-- How can a reviewer verify this works? Specific commands or click-paths. -->

## Screenshots / output

<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after screenshots. For CLI changes, paste the output. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything unusual? Any trade-off you want explicit feedback on? -->
